hero.title: Your customer decides before leaving the store.
hero.sub: No more unfolding 20 shirts for one sale. Show your customer exactly how any cloth looks on them — stitched — and send it to their WhatsApp in 20 seconds.
hero.trust1: No app needed for your customer
hero.trust2: Works on any Android or iPhone
form.title: Reserve your free trial
form.sub: Join the waitlist. We'll WhatsApp you when Dikhao is live in your city.
form.privacy: No spam. Only launch updates for your city.
otp.title: Verify your number
otp.sub: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to {mobile} via WhatsApp.
otp.whatsappNote: Check your WhatsApp for a 6-digit code from Dikhao. Valid for 10 minutes.
success.title: You're on the list!
success.sub: We'll WhatsApp {mobile} the moment Dikhao goes live in your city.
how.title: 3 photos. One result. 20 seconds.
how.sub: Your staff does the work. Your customer gets the wow moment.
how.step1.title: Photograph the customer
how.step1.desc: Staff takes one full-length photo on any phone. Customer stands normally.
how.step2.title: Upload the cloth
how.step2.desc: Photo of the shirt or trouser — flat, on a hanger, whatever's handy.
how.step3.title: Customer gets the look
how.step3.desc: AI generates the outfit on them. Send to their WhatsApp. They share with family. They buy.
pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.sub: Start free for 15 days. No card required. Cancel anytime.
